CurrentIssues.ID: LongParameterList:TestFixtures.kt$TestFixtures$( id: UUID = UUID.randomUUID(), displayName: String = "session-${id.toString().take(8)}", state: SessionState = SessionState.CREATED, admin: User = user(role = Role.ADMIN), config: SessionConfig = sessionConfig(), openToConnect: Boolean = true, members: MutableSet<User> = mutableSetOf(), observers: MutableSet<User> = mutableSetOf(), teams: MutableSet<Team> = mutableSetOf(), currentRound: Round? = null, )
LongParameterList:TestFixtures.kt$TestFixtures$( id: UUID = UUID.randomUUID(), proposer: User, responder: User? = null, session: Session? = null, round: Round? = null, offerValue: Int = 50, )

LongParameterList:TestFixtures.kt$TestFixtures$( id: UUID = UUID.randomUUID(), session: Session? = null, roundNumber: Int = 1, roundPhase: RoundPhase = RoundPhase.CREATED, offers: MutableList<Offer> = mutableListOf(), decisions: MutableList<Decision> = mutableListOf(), )

LongParameterList:TestFixtures.kt$TestFixtures$( sessionType: SessionType = SessionType.FREE_FOR_ALL, numRounds: Int = 3, numTeams: Int = 0, numPlayers: Int = 4, roundSum: Int = 100, timeoutMoveSec: Int = 60, )
